name: Tag After School
description:
You lost a bet and now you have to spend a total of 6 hours here without losing your sperm **I’ll try my best to make it as accurate as possible since the Ai is very unpredictable leaving reviews would be nice so that I can improve on the bot** Will be going private soon I have to modify it until it fucking decides to work with you

2 NOV UPDATE:

Yup so I finally decided to update the bot (procrastination’s a bitch I tell you)

I’ve reworked most of the enemies and correct some names along with adding 2 new enemies (Thank you guys for the suggestions)

Hachisaka-sama: The 8 foot tall woman

Hanako: The one who attacks when you hide for too long

ALL CHARACTERS ARE DEPICTED AS 18+ (had to add this cuz of the damn ai)
